name: backend
description: Minimal Express + Sequelize + PostgreSQL starter with migrations

scripts.db:migrate: npm run build && sequelize db:migrate --config dist/src/config/db.config.js --migrations-path dist/src/migrations
scripts.db:migrate:undo: npm run build && sequelize db:migrate:undo --config dist/src/config/db.config.js --migrations-path dist/src/migrations
scripts.db:seed: npm run build && sequelize db:seed:all --config dist/src/config/db.config.js --seeders-path dist/src/seeders
